title: Here's Johnny!
description: This resource pack replaces the bow and arrow with the gun and bullet.
body:
# Here's Johnny!

This is a resource pack that replaces the bow and arrow with the gun and bullet

![A shotgun sitting on the grass in a spruce forest](https://imagedelivery.net/W9K_l6ndK9x4x8m3rurakg/d1875328-1ce4-4802-f534-0f3bdd771000/original)

![A bullet flying through the air](https://imagedelivery.net/W9K_l6ndK9x4x8m3rurakg/c1b4478f-b844-473e-a3f7-60a0e585ed00/original)
